$comment: A ready-to-run example ICM: a tiny task tracker. Point the host at this folder (icm-gui.cmd example-icm, or icm mcp example-icm) to see every capability - grounded KB answers, the oracle, the proposer, a script tool, and a workflow. Copy this folder and edit it to start your own ICM.
name: example-icm
domain: a tiny task tracker (example instance for the ICM host)

tools.name: ask
tools.description: Answer a question about this task tracker from its knowledge base.

tools.name: validate_tasks
tools.description: Validate a table (e.g. tasks) against its schema: column count, types, ranges, enums.

tools.name: propose_task
tools.description: Propose a new validated row for a table (the model proposes, the oracle gates it, bounded repair).

tools.name: ask_flow
tools.description: Run the grounded-answer workflow (route -> read -> answer).

tools.name: table_stats
tools.description: Report row and column counts for a table file (an example instance-provided script tool).
